reviews.review_title: User Generated Content Coming To An End
reviews.review_description: Get this game while you guys can because the heart and soul of this game which would be the custom levels made by thousands of people will be shutting down in a few months.

Easily one of my favorite games in VR. It's like Lemmings for the old Nintendo but in 3D. It's also a little unsettling in a good way.  Overall it's challenging but not too hard. It's also worth the money because there are tons of levels. I hope they are making another one. I would buy it immediately.
Play a 'game' controlling humans in an alternate universe, while someone somewhere is doing just that in our universe and so on...
Had the pleasure of finally finishing this gem! The levels/puzzles are excellent, the game runs surprisingly well on the quest despite the amount happening on screen. Personally I'd give it 5/5.

Just finished the story mode and am deeply impressed with the beauty, quality and playability of this game. The levels are challenging with refreshing variation. Played it for dozens of hours to fetch all the goldy’s. Highly recommended and worth every penny!

The level design, the progression and the visuals, that are modest but performant with thousand animated humanoids on screen, are spot on.
However, manage your expectations: this is a VR view retrofitted on a flat game.The It uses the motion controllers like a gamepad, no VR interaction of any kind. In a way this is a strenght if you are looking for a seated experience you can play on a plane without waving your hands bumping into everything. Few games are like that. In fact I have some >100 titles for Quest and this is one of the few that ticks this box.
Do you crave for good VR puzzles?

This game is really fun if you like thinking games. You evolve and acquire new powers as you progress. Each level there’s an added challenge of saving big gold people too for extra powers/cosmetics. If you’re a perfectionist like me, you gotta solve the puzzle and save the big gold dudes.

The theme is awesome and this game is a gem. Please add dlc and a mixed reality option

I wasn’t sure if I was interested in this game, but they had a two hour free demo trial so I gave it a try and immediately got hooked.
The music top-notch 
The story and lore, well written and conceived of 
The gameplay super addictive 
And the fact that it also has community driven maps/content there’s always something new to do. 
The only thing I think they could do to improve it would be to take a veg of the Meta quest three augmented reality capabilities
👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

I loved playing this game when it first came out but lately it crashes on every trial as soon as I get to interact with a Goldie. I've reset and updated my headset with no change to this issue. Hopefully a developer sees this and can help me. Upsetting to not be able to play this cool game. Quest 2

developer_response.body: Please consider starting a support ticket so that we can help you more directly with this issue! https://enhance-experience.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

reviews.review_description: I love the games RezHD and Lumines so it was great to see the team creating a new and unique experience for VR. Haven't gotten super far into the game but have been really enjoying the challenging puzzles, unique art style. Also, the music is super quirky and fits the game aesthetic perfectly. Last time I felt this happy playing a puzzle game was Portal and The Witness - great work Enhance team!

Picked this game up twice and found myself smiling so hard at such a fun experience. Takes me back to playing Lemmings as a kid, and the scale is wonderful. Both times I've picked it up I've ended up frustrated with the game crashing seconds before I finish a level. An easy 5 stars without the constant hanging.

developer_response.body: Try restarting your headset but consider contacting our support directly so that we can help you more directly - https://enhance-experience.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

reviews.review_title: I could take the time to write
reviews.review_description:
I could take the time to write an interesting review, but I have to get back to the game. I'm only in an hour or so, so my star awards might change. Two suggestions for the devs: 1) Keep track of the lives that are lost; 2) Let players know how well they do compared to the best.
Ok, now I am several hours in and the game gets better! Except for the music. That gets better and worse since we get options, which include nicer as well as more annoying clips. Also, I don't understand what is the leveling system within PLAY STAGES. Still five stars!

developer_response.body: Keep playing and collecting Goldy. You do unlock a Stats tab later that will tell you that information (though you're not penalized for that, btw). There is no leaderboard, but there IS a leveling system within PLAY STAGES.

reviews.review_description: This is a cool game.  Well done.  I get stressed watching the folks go over the edge while I’m thinking about what to do, but it is excellent.  If you like puzzles, I recommend it.  It gets hard quickly, but that’s the best part…you have to think!

I know this game has won awards and most people love it but I guess I’m not most people. I’ll try and make my points brief.

Horrible music. I had to turn it off 10 minutes in. I’m an audio engineer hobbyist and I love music. The whole game has a synthesizer that plays one sound and one sound only. 

Bad graphics. It looks exactly like a cheap mobile phone game.

Story is mediocre. No engaging characters, no attempt at getting the player invested in the story. 

The puzzles themselves are okay, but after doing a few of them and earning a handful of rewards, I just didn’t feel motivated to continue playing.
Wow what a great concept - such fun - just started so far very cool and enjoyable

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We're glad to hear that you're enjoying the game.

reviews.review_title: Stunning puzzler , game of the year.
reviews.review_description: My game of the year thus far. Simply stunning, the puzzles can be tough but with a little thought they can and will be over come.  A variant to the Lemmings stable with added style. The only gripe I have is the annoying music, thankfully I turn that down. Do not hesitate if you like a challenge. Buy this.

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR games I’ve played
reviews.review_description: This game is a breath of fresh air. I was looking for something fairly laid back. It’s a simple, addictive puzzle game with a brilliant, futuristic aesthetic and atmosphere…and YOU CAN PLAY IT SITTING DOWN! More of this sort of thing please, and less of the flailing arms around wildly sort of things 😂
Just finished Humanity for the second time.  What a clever game!  Even when you complete the story, there is a active community creating scenes that you can run - continued fun with the dog!
A very good adaptation for vr.
